nasb.text: Now it came about on the next day that an evil spirit from God came mightily upon Saul, and he raved in the midst of the house, while David was playing the harp with his hand, as usual; and a spear was in Saul’s hand.

esv.text: The next day a harmful spirit from God rushed upon Saul, and he raved within his house while David was playing the lyre, as he did day by day. Saul had his spear in his hand.

cnv.text: 第二天，從　神那裡來的惡鬼降在掃羅身上，他就在家中胡言亂語。大衛照常彈琴，掃羅手裡拿著槍。

ccb.text: 第二天，从上帝那里来的邪灵突然降在扫罗身上，他就在屋子里叫闹不停，大卫照常为他弹琴。扫罗当时手上拿着矛，
